title: Ensure Interface Names Comply with Naming Convention
description: Sharing naming conventions is crucial for efficient team collaboration. This rule ensures that all interface names match a provided regular expression.
recommendation: Ensure the interface names follow the default regular expression ^[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$. For example, 'myInterface' should be changed to 'MyInterface'.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by enforcing consistent naming conventions for interfaces.

references.title: Interface names should comply with a naming convention

checks.message: Interface names should comply with naming convention (PascalCase)
